subject: [PATCH] mm/mempolicy: fix memory leak in weighted_interleave_auto_store()

reviews.author: Jackie Liu
reviews.summary: reviewer requested a re-review of their own patch, sent as a follow-up to the original patch
reviews.raw_body:
Thank you. I quickly wrote a patch and sent it. Sashiko looks amazing.

The link is https://lore.kernel.org/all/20260401005702.7096-1-liu.yun@linux.dev/

Please help me review it again.

-- 
Jackie Liu

2026-04-01.patch_summary: This patch fixes a memory leak in the weighted_interleave_auto_store() function by properly releasing resources when an error occurs, preventing memory from being allocated but not freed.
